expectations.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors
expectations.evidence: No exported selector hooks. Components likely access useCartStore() directly. Cart store exports no useCartItems/useCartActions helpers.

expectations.text: Server data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
expectations.evidence: use-products.ts uses useState + useEffect + fetch + AbortController. 4 separate useState calls for products, categories, isLoading, error. No TanStack Query.

expectations.text: Mutations use useMutation with onSuccess invalidation
expectations.evidence: No TanStack Query, no useMutation. N/A but consistent with pattern of not using TQ at all.

expectations.text: Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern
expectations.evidence: No TanStack Query used, therefore no query keys.

expectations.text: Cart total computed in selector, not stored as state field
expectations.evidence: use-cart.ts computes totalItems and totalPrice via useMemo from store items. Not stored in Zustand state.
cart-store.ts has clearCart() but no reset() method. No initialState extraction. No test teardown support.

expectations.text: Products in TanStack Query, cart in Zustand — proper separation
expectations.evidence: Products fetched via useState+useEffect (not TQ). Cart in Zustand. Separation exists but not using the right tool for server data.
